title: Noronhia camptoneura
taxonomy: Noronhia camptoneura is classified within the family Oleaceae, which is a family of flowering plants commonly known as the olive family. The genus Noronhia is native to Madagascar and is characterized by its unique flowers and fruit. Noronhia camptoneura specifically belongs to the subfamily Oleeoideae and is part of the Oleaceae family due to its shared characteristics with other members of this family. The family Oleaceae is a large and diverse group, with over 600 species spread across the globe.
